latin: Decem nautae in nave spatiali erant, sed unus ex eis impostor erat. 'ille suspectus est,' dixit nauta ruber. ceteri de sententia eius dubitaverunt.

questions.prompt: How many crew members were on the ship?
What did the red crew member say?

translation: Ten crew members were on a spaceship, but one of them was an impostor. 'That one is suspicious,' said the red crew member. The others doubted his judgment.
